title: No Java source files in workspace
evidence: find src -type f -name '*.java' returns 0 results; only src/test/resources/application.properties exists. Workspace has pom.xml, README.md, and config but zero .java files
suggestion: Agent failed to emit Java source code; only scaffolding (pom.xml, README.md, test properties) was archived

title: POST /books endpoint missing — no controller code
evidence: No Java source files in workspace; no BookController or equivalent exists under src/main/java/
suggestion: Implement a Spring Boot @RestController with @PostMapping for /books

title: GET /books list endpoint missing
evidence: No Java source files in workspace; no controller with @GetMapping for /books
suggestion: Implement a @GetMapping("/books") handler returning all books

title: GET /books ?author= filter missing
evidence: No Java source files; no query parameter handling code exists
suggestion: Add @RequestParam(required=false) String author to the list endpoint

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint missing
evidence: No Java source files; no get-by-id route exists

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint missing
evidence: No Java source files; no update route exists

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint missing
evidence: No Java source files; no delete route exists

title: SQLite configured in scaffolding but no entity/repository code
evidence: pom.xml:38 declares sqlite-jdbc 3.45.1.0; src/test/resources/application.properties:1 configures jdbc:sqlite::memory: with SQLiteDialect — but no @Entity or JpaRepository classes exist
suggestion: Create Book @Entity and BookRepository extending JpaRepository

title: No JSON responses or HTTP status codes implemented
evidence: No Java source files; no ResponseEntity or @ResponseStatus usage exists
suggestion: Return ResponseEntity with appropriate status codes from controller methods

title: Input validation not implemented
evidence: pom.xml:35 declares spring-boot-starter-validation but no @NotBlank or @Valid annotations exist (no Java files)
suggestion: Add @NotBlank to title/author in Book entity, use @Valid on controller parameters

title: GET /health endpoint missing
evidence: No Java source files; no health check controller or actuator configuration

title: No tests exist — zero test files
